title: My First Website
description: My very first HTML & CSS website. It taught me the fundamentals of web structure, styling, layouts and responsive design.

title: Mentor Me Fundraiser
description: My first full-stack app. I designed and built both the back end and front end independently. Mentors can create fundraisers, post available time slots, and mentees can browse and book sessions.

title: Open Book
description: A collaborative group project where I mostly focused on the back-end development and contributed to the front end. A platform that simplifies the book club experience — organise clubs, schedule meetings and track reading in one place.
